prompt: A breathtaking cinematic fantasy portrait of a mysterious young woman with long, flowing copper-red wavy hair, standing inside a majestic Gothic cathedral illuminated by warm golden candlelight. She slowly lifts an ornate Venetian masquerade mask adorned with gold filigree, pearls, and sapphire gemstones, gazing at it with a calm, enigmatic expression. Soft volumetric light streams from above, creating a divine glow around her hair and face. The camera begins with a close-up of the jeweled mask, then smoothly dollies in toward her face with subtle handheld motion. Her luxurious navy velvet gown features intricate embroidery, adding a regal medieval aesthetic. Floating dust particles, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic skin texture, cinematic color grading, dramatic lighting, masterpiece quality, photorealistic, 8K, vertical 9:16, smooth slow motion, elegant, mystical, luxury fantasy atmosphere.

promptZh: 一张令人惊叹的电影感奇幻肖像，描绘了一位神秘的年轻女子，留着 飘逸的长款铜红色波浪卷发，站在宏伟的 哥特式大教堂 内，被温暖的金色烛光照亮。她缓缓举起一个 饰有金丝、珍珠和蓝宝石的华丽威尼斯化装舞会面具，以平静而神秘的表情凝视着它。柔和的体积光从上方倾泻而下，在她的头发和脸庞周围营造出神圣的光晕。镜头先是特写珠宝面具，随后平滑地推向她的脸部，并带有细微的手持拍摄动感。她身穿奢华的深蓝色天鹅绒礼服，饰有复杂的刺绣，增添了庄重的中古美学感。漂浮的尘埃颗粒、浅景深、超写实皮肤纹理、电影级调色、戏剧性光影、大师级品质、照片级真实感、8K 分辨率、9:16 竖屏、平滑慢动作、优雅、神秘、奢华奇幻氛围。
